category_sources: source_facts.description says it visualizes and analyzes C/C++ include graphs; official GitHub README describes include graph analysis commands.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is clang-include-graph; official GitHub README title uses clang-include-graph.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, and examples and is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README list C++ include graph analysis, visualization formats, and CLI usage.
